title: OT-Tabletop-Übungsgenerator / OT Tabletop Exercise Generator
description: Browser-based, bilingual (DE/EN) generator for OT incident tabletop exercises: schedule, injects (entry vector x target system x sector), containment dilemma per no-touch logic, optional BSI reporting and media complications, observer sheet, debrief guide with NIST CSF v2 lessons-learned grid, spoiler-free invitation. Companion to the book 'ISMS für die Industrie' (Springer Vieweg, 2026), ch. 8.4.
